basic_details.job_title: ECHS Tamil Nadu Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 40 Driver, Clerk and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme Tamil Nadu
basic_details.post_name: Contractual Staff (Driver, Clerk and More Posts)
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme Tamil Nadu (ECHS Tamil Nadu) Contractual Staff (Driver, Clerk and More Posts) Notification 2026 has been released on 01-07-2026 at the official website www.echstn.gov.in. A total of 40 vacancies have been announced under the ECHS Tamil Nadu Contractual Staff Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Age limit is not specified in the official notification. However, the contract is renewable till the maximum age, subject to performance and other conditions.

qualification.education_qualification: Various qualifications from 8th pass to Graduate and Post Graduate degrees with relevant experience.
qualification.details: OIC (ESM Only): Graduate, Minimum 5 years work experience in HealthCare institution or managerial positions. Medical Specialist: MD/MS in Specialist concerned/DNB, Minimum 3 years in the subject concerned after Post Graduation. Medical Officer: MBBS, Minimum 3 years experience after internship. Preferable additional qualification in Medicine/Surgery. Dental Officer: BDS, Minimum 3 years work experience. Laboratory Technician: B Sc (Medical Lab Tech) OR Matriculation/Higher Secondary/Senior Secondary (10+2) with Science from recognized board. Diploma in Medical Lab Technology from a recognized institution. Minimum 3 years experience. DT/DH/DORA: Diploma Holder in Dental Hyg/Class 1 DH/DORA Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 3 years experience. Driver: Education - 8th pass, Class-1 MT Dvr (Armed Forces). Minimum 5 years experience. Possess a civil driving license. DEO/Clerk: Graduate / Class | Clerical trade (Armed Forces), Minimum 5 years experience. Female Attendant: Literate, Minimum 5 years experience in Civil Army Health institutions. Peon: Education Class 8 or GD Trade for Armed Forces, Minimum 5 years experience. Safaiwala: Literate, Minimum 5 years experience. Chowkidar: Education Class 8 or GD Trade for Armed Forces Personnel. Medical Specialist (ESM only): MD/MS in Specialist concerned/DNB. Minimum 3 years in the subject concerned after Post Graduation. Medical Officer (ESM only): MBBS, Minimum 3 years experience after internship. Preferable additional qualification in Medicine / Surgery. Dental Officer (ESM only): BDS, Minimum 3 years work experience. Radiographer (ESM only): Diploma/Class 1 Radiographer Course (Armed Forces) Minimum 5 years experience. Laboratory Technician (ESM only): B Sc (Medical Lab Tech) OR Matriculation/Higher Secondary/Senior Secondary (10+2) with Science from recognized board. Diploma in Medical Lab Technology from a recognized institution. Minimum 3 years experience. Physiotherapist (ESM only): Diploma/ Class 1 Physio- therapy Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 5 years experience. Nursing Assistant (ESM only): GNM Diploma/Class 1 Course (Armed Forces) Minimum 5 years experience. DT/DH/DORA (ESM only): Diploma Holder in Dental Hyg/Class 1 DH/DORA Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 3 years experience. Female Attendant (ESM only): Literate, Minimum 5 years experience. Safaiwala (ESM only): Literate, Minimum 5 years experience.

selection_process: Written test / Practical Exams (except Med Spl
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Tamil Nadu Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Tamil Nadu Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ECHS Tamil Nadu Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ECHS Tamil Nadu Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ECHS Tamil Nadu Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: OIC (ESM Only): Graduate, Minimum 5 years work experience in HealthCare institution or managerial positions. Medical Specialist: MD/MS in Specialist concerned/DNB, Minimum 3 years in the subject concerned after Post Graduation. Medical Officer: MBBS, Minimum 3 years experience after internship. Preferable additional qualification in Medicine/Surgery. Dental Officer: BDS, Minimum 3 years work experience. Laboratory Technician: B Sc (Medical Lab Tech) OR Matriculation/Higher Secondary/Senior Secondary (10+2) with Science from recognized board. Diploma in Medical Lab Technology from a recognized institution. Minimum 3 years experience. DT/DH/DORA: Diploma Holder in Dental Hyg/Class 1 DH/DORA Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 3 years experience. Driver: Education - 8th pass, Class-1 MT Dvr (Armed Forces). Minimum 5 years experience. Possess a civil driving license. DEO/Clerk: Graduate / Class | Clerical trade (Armed Forces), Minimum 5 years experience. Female Attendant: Literate, Minimum 5 years experience in Civil Army Health institutions. Peon: Education Class 8 or GD Trade for Armed Forces, Minimum 5 years experience. Safaiwala: Literate, Minimum 5 years experience. Chowkidar: Education Class 8 or GD Trade for Armed Forces Personnel. Medical Specialist (ESM only): MD/MS in Specialist concerned/DNB. Minimum 3 years in the subject concerned after Post Graduation. Medical Officer (ESM only): MBBS, Minimum 3 years experience after internship. Preferable additional qualification in Medicine / Surgery. Dental Officer (ESM only): BDS, Minimum 3 years work experience. Radiographer (ESM only): Diploma/Class 1 Radiographer Course (Armed Forces) Minimum 5 years experience. Laboratory Technician (ESM only): B Sc (Medical Lab Tech) OR Matriculation/Higher Secondary/Senior Secondary (10+2) with Science from recognized board. Diploma in Medical Lab Technology from a recognized institution. Minimum 3 years experience. Physiotherapist (ESM only): Diploma/ Class 1 Physio- therapy Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 5 years experience. Nursing Assistant (ESM only): GNM Diploma/Class 1 Course (Armed Forces) Minimum 5 years experience. DT/DH/DORA (ESM only): Diploma Holder in Dental Hyg/Class 1 DH/DORA Course (Armed Forces), Minimum 3 years experience. Female Attendant (ESM only): Literate, Minimum 5 years experience. Safaiwala (ESM only): Literate, Minimum 5 years experience.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Tamil Nadu Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Tamil Nadu Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Age limit is not specified in the official notification. However, the contract is renewable till the maximum age, subject to performance and other conditions.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Tamil Nadu Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last date of receipt of application

content_sections.heading: ECHS Tamil Nadu Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Written test / Practical Exams (except Med Spl, Med Offr, Female Attendant, Peon, Safaiwala and Chowkidar) Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Tamil Nadu Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Tamil Nadu Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Tamil Nadu Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the ECHS Tamil Nadu Contractual Staff positions is 15th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Contractual Staff in ECHS Tamil Nadu?
faq.answer: There are a total of 40 vacancies for various Contractual Staff positions announced by ECHS Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for ECHS Tamil Nadu jobs?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification ranges from 8th pass to Graduate and Post Graduate degrees, depending on the specific post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the Contractual Staff positions?
faq.answer: The salary for these contractual roles ranges from Rs. 21,800/- to Rs. 1,30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit is not specified, but contracts are renewable based on performance and other conditions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for ECHS Tamil Nadu Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for these positions is strictly offline.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of ECHS, which is www.echs.gov.in.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to submit self-attested photocopies of testimonials for educational qualifications, medical fitness certificate, and work experience.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a written test/practical exam (for most posts) followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q10. Which posts are reserved for ESM (Ex-Servicemen) only?
faq.answer: Several posts like OIC (ESM Only), Medical Specialist (ESM only), Medical Officer (ESM only), Dental Officer (ESM only), Radiographer (ESM only), Laboratory Technician (ESM only), Physiotherapist (ESM only), Nursing Assistant (ESM only), DT/DH/DORA (ESM only), Female Attendant (ESM only), and Safaiwala (ESM only) are specifically for Ex-Servicemen.
